Improved lots since 2023. Can change location to SD card, audio source, bitrate, format (mp3/mp4/wav) & gain. Can record internal audio, incl. & excluding mic. Can mark, resume, disregard, trim, alter, compress, trash, backup & share recording. Can quick record via quick panel. Option to use Bluetooth mic via one-time unlock ($14). v1.3.4.1 is worth it. Only thing would be specifying audio source. Not sure difference btwn Default, Main & Main (unprocessed). Back (cam)? Front (Top or Bottom mic)?
easy and efficient. works great for humming my melodies and then listening later to make my songs.
